Ok, so this is all about lists – email lists. Because that’s what gives you all the power
in your business. It’s what’s driven all of my success.
Now, contrary to popular belief, I was not born with a list and I had to start from
zero just like everyone else has to start from zero. And I actually started from zero in my
original business, which was about the stock market, then when I switched to teaching
people about entrepreneurship, I had to start over again. So I’ve started from scratch two
different times. And what I know is that when you focus on building your list, that’s what
gives you long term success.
So, at the heart of it – it’s really about creating a compelling offer so that when
people come to your page, that they want to give you their email address in exchange for
your offer. So it’s creating a great offer, creating a great opt-in page (or squeeze page) and
then driving traffic to it.
So now in this video, I’m not going to talk about the driving traffic piece, we’re just
going to talk about the opt-in page and getting that right. Because I think the people that
really struggle with list building are the people that haven’t put in the time to create a
really compelling offer and a great squeeze page.
Now the great news is that these days, there’s lots of great tools to build squeeze
pages. Five, ten, fifteen, twenty years ago, it was a pain in the neck – it was really hard.
Now it’s so much easier to get the design right. So good design, and a good offer – that’s
what this entire video is about. And the good news is - I’m going to be teaching from
examples all the way through.
So I recently did a call for my Launch Club coaching program – the people that
were in Launch Club which is this really cool coaching program that I’ve got, and I
gathered up a whole bunch of their opt-in pages. I basically went through them one after
another and critiqued them and said what I thought worked and what I thought didn’t
work.
Of course, it’s not like I’m infallible. I’ve got perfect judgement. But I do have a lot
of experience with this. So that’s what this video is going to be – you’re going to see
example after example. And I love this style of learning and teaching because like, when

prelaunch and she's totally mimicking this and we starting doing this a couple of years

We actually have, this is just a slide it's not animated, but in real life, when you

was actually counting down. So at the start of prelaunch, our prelaunch is 10 days long, it

32 seconds. And it would just be counting down. We actually have a countdown timer to

it was legit, hard deadline to get this free training.
We tested the headlines pretty extensively. This headline really worked well for us.
I'll tell you one thing, if you look at this whole page, it's sort of, everything's designed and
it works together and we tested different images and that was the best image that
performed. And when you click on that play button it would pop up something that says

that really wouldn't make much difference.
The things that make a difference on this squeeze page is the headline, probably the
most important and then the image is pretty darn important, then that whole, having the
countdown was pretty cool and then the actual, the button and the text you put on that
button. So that instantly download the Mindmap and System is a button. And that text is
actually pretty darn important. When you design your page, put the most effort into the
headline and then also put, if you're going to do something like this with an image like
that, test the images and then the actual text on the button is always important. Those are
things to focus on.
There's two different pieces here, it's what is the actual offer and then how do you
